T0093.title: Data Supplier
T0093.definition: A primary individual or organization that possesses and sells large volumes of leaked data. The data supplier is a central role in the underground supply chain, acquiring data through various means, then organizing and categorizing it for sale at a premium to downstream buyers. These buyers typically use the data for fraud, identity theft, and cyberattacks.
